description_long: This object is a decorative flower arrangement set in a square, dark-colored planter supported by an ornate wrought iron stand. The flowers are clustered in dense, rounded inflorescences with a vibrant orange hue, and the foliage consists of broad, green leaves that fill out the planter. The iron stand features elegant, looping scrollwork and provides a stable, elevated base for the planter. The planter itself appears to be made of metal or ceramic, with a matte finish and a slightly tapered shape. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near building entrances. The combination of vivid flowers and intricate metalwork makes this object a striking addition to urban environments.
description: A vibrant orange flower arrangement in a square planter, elevated on an ornate wrought iron stand with lush green foliage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full display of orange flower clusters and the decorative scrollwork of the iron stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the planter and the dense arrangement of flowers and leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the foliage and the symmetrical design of the iron stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the planter's profile and the lush greenery spilling over the edges.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in dense, rounded clusters forming composite inflorescences, with a generally radial symmetry and overlapping layers typical of many ornamental garden flowers.
